name: Quick Cheddar Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Spray the inside of an 8x4x3-inch loaf pan with cooking spray.
3. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt until well combined.
4. Cut butter into the dry ingredients using a pastry blender or two knives held like scissors until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together milk and egg.
6. Pour the milk mixture into the flour mixture all at once; stir in cheddar cheese until just combined.
7. Pour batter into prepared pan and spread to an even layer.
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown on top and a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Remove bread from pan and let cool on a wire rack. If not serving immediately, wrap the loaf in plastic wrap and store at room temperature for up to 3 days.
